series_metadata.series_title: Survey of High Risk Clients Regarding AI
series_metadata.series_description: These records surveys targeted populations to determine their understanding of & behavior to AIDS. Surveys include information about population's age, race, sex, sexual preferences, socio- economic status, marital status, & behavioral/social value-relate

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Maintain on hard drive in office and maintain floppy disk in an approved records storage center two years; ; Paper: Maintain in office
